prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.2 kg; Height 159.2 cm; BMI 20.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 192mg/dL; 9 months ago 201mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.7kg; 9 months ago 52.7kg; 6 months ago 53.1kg; 3 months ago 49.8kg; current 52.2kg), Height (12 months ago 159.2cm; 9 months ago 159.2cm; 6 months ago 159.2cm; 3 months ago 159.2cm; current 159.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 67mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 34U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 373mg/g; 9 months ago 253mg/g; 6 months ago 239mg/g; 3 months ago 302mg/g; current 262mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 136mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.52 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
